name: Mir Alam Tank Road
description: Very dim street lights along the tank bund road.

name: Golnaka Back Lanes
description: Narrow residential lanes with broken street lights.

name: Shaikpet Nala Area
description: Open nala area with almost no lighting after sunset.

name: Langar Houz Bylanes
description: Interior bylanes lack adequate street lighting infrastructure.

name: Uppal Industrial Area
description: Industrial zone with minimal lighting during night shifts.

name: Chandrayangutta Outskirts
description: Peripheral area with very poor infrastructure and lighting. Gang violence reported.

name: IS Sadan - Necklace Road Stretch
description: Some sections near the lake have dim lighting patches.

name: Malkajgiri Railway Colony
description: Old railway colony lanes with sparse and aging street lights.

name: Bowenpally Market Backside
description: Rear side of the wholesale market is poorly illuminated.

name: Habsiguda Colony Interior
description: Internal colony roads have intermittent lighting coverage.

name: Moosapet Bridge Area
description: Under-bridge areas are extremely dark and poorly maintained.

name: Rajendranagar Forest Road
description: Forest-adjacent road with zero artificial lighting.

name: Narsingi Construction Corridor
description: Rapid construction zone with temporary roads and no permanent street lighting. IT corridor expansion area.

name: Gachibowli Back Roads
description: Service roads behind IT parks with incomplete lighting infrastructure despite high case volume.

name: Raidurgam Under-Construction Zone
description: Financial District expansion zone with large unlit patches between high-rises.

name: ORR Stretch — Shamshabad
description: Outer Ring Road stretch near airport with minimal lighting. Accident-prone zone — ORR fatalities doubled in 2025.

name: ORR Stretch — Ghatkesar
description: High-speed ORR segment with near-zero lighting in semi-rural stretch. Multiple fatalities recorded.

name: Vanasthalipuram Dark Pockets
description: Residential interior pockets with poor civic infrastructure. Area of a major domestic homicide in 2025.

name: Ghouse Nagar Interior
description: Narrow interior lanes in gang activity zone. Site of Chandrayangutta retaliation killing.

name: Falaknuma Heritage Zone
description: Historic area surrounding Falaknuma Palace with aging infrastructure and minimal modern lighting.
